subject: Galarian Perrserker, a stocky bipedal feline Pokemon with dark hardened-hair helmet and claws
description: A stocky bipedal feline creature with what appears to be a dark rounded helmet-like structure on its head stands in an aggressive action pose with claws raised. The creature has a muscular compact build, a fierce expression with visible teeth, and curved claw-tipped limbs extended outward. The background is light and indistinct. The overall coloring is dark grey and black with lighter accents. The creature projects aggression and readiness for combat.
foreground: bipedal feline creature in aggressive stance with claws raised
emotion: teeth bared, claws raised, aggressive combat stance
